artifact_value: Dual case: Donald Norby stole confidential documents from SwiftLogic Inc. and was found dead. He was negotiating the sale of Palomino product documents with Mr. E. Yob Taog's phone was compromised with malware that exfiltrated PDFs.
SMS from malware confirming periodic exfiltration of PDFs | Negotiation of intellectual property sale via SMS/email
Hardcoded reference to external server 50.56.29.109 in malware code | Systematic downloads of confidential PDFs at regular intervals
Confidential competitor documents on phone SD card | Search history on target company employees indicates prior reconnaissance
Industrial espionage negotiation pattern with renegotiation attempt | Suspect's death under violent circumstances after attempting to raise the price
